title: 2D array in `generate if` construct lint failure

features.name: generate if with 2D array element comparison
features.description: Code should include a generate if block where the condition compares a value against a 2D array element accessed via two indices

features.name: 2D array localparam with integer element type
features.description: Code should include a localparam declaration of a 2D unpacked array with integer element type and multi-dimensional array literal initialization
